name: amazon_shop_scraper
title: Amazon Creator Shop Scraper
description: Retrieve public Amazon creator storefront profiles, social accounts, Idea Lists, and trending products.

seo.title: Amazon Creator Storefront Scraper API
seo.description: Retrieve public Amazon influencer storefront identity, social accounts, Idea Lists, and trending product metadata for agents.
seo.intro: Amazon Creator Shop Scraper renders a public /shop storefront and normalizes the creator profile, external social accounts, Idea Lists, item counts, list imagery, and currently visible trending product ASINs, prices, badges, and images.

useCases.title: Creator commerce research
useCases.description: Resolve an Amazon storefront to the creator's public identity, bio, avatar, and external social accounts.

useCases.title: Collection monitoring
useCases.description: Track a creator's visible Idea Lists, list IDs, item counts, imagery, and canonical URLs.

useCases.title: Product trend discovery
useCases.description: Capture the ASINs, prices, badges, and images Amazon currently surfaces as trending for that storefront.

faqs.question: Does this require an Amazon login?
faqs.answer: No. It reads public creator storefront pages.

faqs.question: Does it purchase products or add items to cart?
faqs.answer: No. It only returns public storefront metadata.

faqs.question: Why does the tool use a browser strategy?
faqs.answer: Amazon's storefront response is compressed and progressively enhanced; browser rendering yields the complete public creator and collection surface reliably.

url.description: Public Amazon /shop/{handle} URL. Scheme is optional.
